block_00: Waqt agya hai Jashn e Azadi Mananay ka
block_03: Mauka aur Maukay par chakka! Jashan-e-azadi par IQ option phir se laya apke liye trading tournament.
block_04: 13 August se 17 August 2022 tak Jashan-e-azadi tournament mein hissa lain aur payen $1000  jeetnay ka mauka. Humary tournament ka hissa banain aur payen Phelay 14 traders mein anay ka mauka jinn mein yeh prize pool taqseem kiya jayega.
block_09: 14 Aug ko shamil hu kay moqabala karien!
